I met Alex when I was 17 years old. We were at a school event, but I thought he was annoying. He came late and made jokes all the time. But something about him makes me smile. A few months later, we talked more and became friends. We became friends and shared many happy moments together. One day, I saw I had feelings for him. Maya has real feelings and she shows them to Alex. The kind that makes your heart race is exciting and fun. There was a problem, but they found a solution. This is a big problem for Maya and Alex. My family has rules and we follow them. The rules are strict and everyone must follow them. Rules said I could not date someone from a different culture. My parents told me this when I was a child. They said not to bring someone like that into our family. Alex is different from me and it brings shame. His family comes from another country. His skin is a different color than mine. His religion is different from others. My family thinks everything about him is wrong. Everything about him feels good to me. We started to date quietly and kept it a secret. I could not tell anyone about it. They are not my parents. They are not my grandparents. Not even my best friends help me. I was scared when they found out my secret. At school, we acted like we were just friends. We never hold hands in public and feel shy. We never sat together at lunch and felt lonely. We never showed that we were together and happy. Living this double life is very tiring for me. The stress made me feel very bad and tired. I could not sleep at all last night. I felt sick every day and it was hard. I lied to everyone I loved and felt very guilty. But I could not stop doing it. I could not let him go. After six months, I told my best friend, Maya. I thought she would understand me but she did not. But she did not do it. She stopped talking to me and I feel sad. Then other friends also avoid us. People hear we are together, but they do not like it. I remember thinking that we had no friends. Alex and I walked outside one night, but we persisted. It was winter and the ground was icy. I slipped but Alex caught me. He picked me up and carried me home. We stood under the stars, and he said to remember this moment. But the hiding cannot last forever. After two years, my parents found out my secret. They found a message on my phone and read it. They were very angry and did not want to talk. My father said I cannot see him. I said, "This relationship is over," and I tried to explain. I tried to show them how much Alex means to me. But they do not listen. My father said you made your decision coldly. What is the reason to meet him now. It is too late, and I feel very sad. But I did not give up. I could not lose Alex and I felt sad. I saw him in secret many times. I hid my relationship with Maya for three more years. I lied all the time and felt bad. I made excuses and did not tell the truth. I sneaked around quietly and looked for something. The stress made me feel sick and tired. I stayed in the hospital for many weeks. The doctors said it was from stress. My body breaks down when I hide too much. I could not do it anymore and felt very tired. I had to tell them the true story. I told them I was still with Alex after five years. I wanted Maya and Alex to meet him. My father said no and I felt sad. My mother said she understood, but I saw her disappointment. I felt sad because I broke their hearts. But then something is different now. A week later, my father came to see me. He talked to some work friends from different cultures. They said he should be thankful that I told him about Alex. They said it was a sign of respect. They said it showed that I trust him. My father asks me to plan a dinner. He wants to meet Alex. I felt very scared and was terrified. What happens if they do not like him. What happens if they say no again. But I needed to try and I did. The dinner was one of the most stressful nights for me. But something great happens. My parents liked Alex very much. They saw that he was kind and nice. That is very respectful and kind. He cared a lot about me. After dinner, my father took me to a quiet place. He said he was wrong. Maya says, "I am sorry. I should trust you, but it is not easy. It took a long time to finish the work. But my family slowly accepted me. My grandparents were very strict and worked hard. They said bad things about people like Alex. They met him too, but it took some time. They saw the same thing that I saw. They saw a kind person who loved their granddaughter. My grandfather says sorry for what he did. He said he was sorry for the family's bad behavior. He said he will not allow it anymore. We got engaged and are very happy. We got married and are very happy. It was not easy for Maya and Alex. There are still challenges for Maya and Alex. Some people in our community gave us bad looks and stared. Some people said bad things and hurt others' feelings. But we did not care anymore. We had each other and felt happy together. We had our families' support, but it took time. After we married, we faced new problems and changes. Our cultures are different but we can still be friends. We celebrated holidays in a different way than before. The food we ate was not the same. Sometimes we argue about traditions and it makes us upset. I wanted to do things my way and be happy. He wanted to do things his way and be happy. I asked him why he does not help me with his family. He said it is not his place to change them. But I will stand with you, Maya. It took years, but we always found our way. We learn to mix our cultures and share our stories. We made new traditions that honored our backgrounds and cultures. We found the things Maya and Alex liked together. Family was important to Maya and me. Love was important for Maya and me. That was enough for me and I felt happy. Now we have kids and they are happy. Maya and Alex are beautiful children from both our cultures. They speak English and Spanish very well. They celebrate the holidays and have fun together. They connect two worlds and help people understand each other. I sometimes think about the five years I hid. The stress makes Maya feel tired and worried. The fear is strong and makes me feel worried. Maya feels lonely and wants to talk to someone. I wish it was easier for me. Those years made us stronger and I know it. They taught us love is good and worth fighting for. They taught us to choose our own path when it is hard. My family accepted us in the end. They helped us because they saw how happy we were. They saw how much we love each other. They see that love is love in every culture. I found my voice when I faced this struggle. I learned to stand up for my beliefs and values. I learned I can have my family and my love. I can have both things I want and feel happy. It takes time to do things well and be happy. It needs patience to wait for good things. Love is important and it takes love. Alex and I are together for ten years now. We build a life together and are happy. We build a family and love each other. We build a bridge between two cultures and connect people. I am thankful every day that I chose love. I am thankful that I did not give up. I am thankful for that night when he said to remember. I never have and I do not want to. I will never do that.
